# Architectuur Beslissingen {#section-design-decisions}

De meest actuele overzicht van architectuur beslissingen staan op [github.com/plugin-healthcare](https://github.com/plugin-healthcare). Hieronder is een samenvatting. In geval van discrepanties is de GitHub repository leidend.

## [PLUGIN-Lake](https://github.com/plugin-healthcare/pluginlake/blob/dev/docs/decisions/README.md)

::: {.list-table tbl-colwidths="[15,55,15,15]"}

- - ID
  - Title
  - Status
  - Date

- - [ADR-001](https://github.com/plugin-healthcare/pluginlake/blob/dev/docs/decisions/adr-001-asset-architecture.md)
  - Asset architecture and extensibility
  - Accepted 
  - 2026-02-17

- - [ADR-002](https://github.com/plugin-healthcare/pluginlake/blob/dev/docs/decisions/adr-002-omop-storage-architecture.md)
  - OMOP data storage architecture
  - Proposed
  - 2026-02-17

- - [ADR-003](https://github.com/plugin-healthcare/pluginlake/blob/dev/docs/decisions/adr-003-ducklake-data-catalog.md)
  - DuckLake integration with Dagster + logging
  - Proposed
  - 2026-02-23

- - [ADR-004](https://github.com/plugin-healthcare/pluginlake/blob/dev/docs/decisions/adr-004-data-organization.md)
  - Data organization and naming conventions
  - Proposed
  - 2026-02-24

- - [ADR-005](https://github.com/plugin-healthcare/pluginlake/blob/dev/docs/decisions/adr-005-fastapi-gateway.md)
  - FastAPI as unified API gateway
  - Proposed
  - 2026-03-05

- - [ADR-006](https://github.com/plugin-healthcare/pluginlake/pull/105/changes#diff-5af550ecfe82d86872269cb5e5a1b527357a5945b9f6554632e94a02e0e10431)
  - Nuts Node for decentralized authentication and authorization
  - Draft
  - 2026-04-01

- - ADR-007
  - OpenLineage for column-level lineage
  - Draft
  - 2026-04-01
  
:::
